title: Input Component Styling
description: Refactor ui-input component styles to use CSS variables. Update background, border, focus states, and transitions. Replace hardcoded colors (#3c3c3c, #555, #f90) with design tokens while maintaining Cocos Creator 2.x native component compatibility.

criteria: ui-input:focus box-shadow uses var(--primary-color) with opacity
convergence.definition_of_done: All ui-input styles migrated to CSS variables with proper focus states

implementation.title: Migrate ui-input base styles
implementation.description: Replace hardcoded colors in ui-input selector
modification_points: Replace border: 1px solid #555 with border: 1px solid var(--border-default)
Add transition: border-color var(--transition-fast), background var(--transition-fast)
logic_flow: Add transition for smooth hover/focus effects

implementation.title: Migrate ui-input focus state
implementation.description: Update focus styles with CSS variables and improve accessibility
modification_points: Replace box-shadow color with var(--primary-color) using 25% opacity
Ensure focus state provides visible feedback (4.5:1 contrast)
logic_flow: Update box-shadow to use --primary-color with rgba opacity

implementation.title: Update path input group
logic_flow: Update gap to use spacing variable

context: Host and layout colors migrated to CSS variables

rationale.focus_color: Focus ring changed from orange to green for consistency with CTA color

risks: Must preserve ui-input native component functionality
